messenger.name: Ale Ale
messenger.msg: I didn’t see the date thanks for letting me know also will it be open on 4th of July?

cls.reason: LLM (en, 0.95): Simple factual question about July 4th hours. Fort Collins event is July 3–5, so July 4th falls within the event dates (Fri-Sun, 10am-5pm).
cls.reply: You're welcome! Yes, we'll be open on July 4th! 🎉 Fort Collins runs Fri-Sun, July 3–5, so we'll be there all weekend 10am–5pm. See you there, babe! 💄✨

cls.reason: LLM (en, 0.95): Simple question about event timing. Today is July 4, 2026. Fort Collins event is July 3-5, so tomorrow (July 5) is the final day. Clear factual
cls.reply: Yes! 🎉 Tomorrow is our last day in Fort Collins (Sunday, July 5) — we're open 10am-5pm at The Drake Centre, 802 W Drake Rd. Don't miss out! 💄✨
